overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character in a green jacket exploring a fog-shrouded abandoned residential neighborhood. The character walks along sidewalks, through narrow alleys between brick buildings, and across muddy backyards in a heavily atmospheric, desaturated environment with Victorian architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy residential sidewalk with Victorian houses

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the concrete sidewalk past old Victorian houses with wooden porches and stairs

entered.detail: two-story stone house with wooden porch, white columns, and front stairs
overhead utility wires stretching across the foggy street between poles
paved pedestrian walkway with visible cracks and weeds growing between sections
tall tree with sparse autumn leaves emerging from the dense fog

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a concrete sidewalk next to fog-shrouded Victorian houses with wooden porches. Power lines stretch overhead through the mist, and sparse trees line the right side of the path while the street fades into white fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley between ivy-covered brick buildings

events.description: character turns left into a narrow alleyway between two tall brick buildings

agents.ego_description: turning into a narrow passage and walking between tall brick walls covered in dense ivy vegetation

entered.detail: tall weathered red brick building wall covered in dense green ivy vines
tall red brick building wall with broken windows and dark patches
rusted metal gate blocking the far end of the alley passage

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a narrow, enclosed alley between weathered brick buildings covered in dense ivy. The ground changes to dirt, the sky is mostly obscured by the tall walls, and the atmosphere becomes more claustrophobic.

scene_state.functional_zone: muddy backyard with wooden fences and scattered debris

events.description: passes through a wooden gate into an open backyard area with muddy ground

agents.ego_description: walking through a desolate backyard past wooden fences, discarded plastic chairs, and clotheslines with hanging laundry

entered.detail: dilapidated wooden picket fence with missing slats and gray weathered wood
tall wooden fence overgrown with vines and vegetation
uneven dirt ground with large puddles, patches of grass, and scattered debris
discarded white plastic lawn chair sitting abandoned in the mud
rope line with hanging white sheets and laundry fluttering in the fog

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the alley into a desolate backyard, the character traverses muddy ground surrounded by weathered wooden fences. Discarded plastic chairs, clotheslines with hanging white sheets, and overgrown vegetation populate the foggy enclosure as the character approaches another gate.

events.description: exits the backyard through a wooden gate onto an asphalt street with parked cars

agents.ego_description: walking onto a paved street and passing abandoned vehicles in the dense fog

entered.detail: paved asphalt road surface with visible cracks and puddles reflecting the gray sky
abandoned vintage green station wagon parked at the curb
single-story white commercial building with garage doors and faded paint
wooden telephone pole with crossbars and hanging wires

segments.scene_description: The character exits the backyard through a wooden gate onto an asphalt street. An abandoned green station wagon is parked on the left, while a low commercial garage building appears ahead. The street stretches into the dense fog with scattered trees and utility poles lining the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that shifts from an open, fog-shrouded residential street into a claustrophobic, enclosed alleyway. It begins by following the character along a concrete sidewalk lined with Victorian houses and wooden porches, where power lines and sparse trees disappear into a thick white mist. As the character moves forward, the open street narrows and the terrain shifts from concrete to dirt. The scene then transitions into a tight corridor between weathered brick buildings draped in dense ivy, with the tall walls gradually obscuring the sky and intensifying the sense of confinement.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the claustrophobic confines of a muddy backyard into the open, desolate expanse of a fog-shrouded street. It begins with the character traversing weathered wooden fences and overgrown vegetation, passing discarded plastic chairs and white sheets hanging from clotheslines. As the character approaches the perimeter of the yard, the scene shifts through a wooden gate that opens onto a gray asphalt road. The environment then expands to reveal an abandoned green station wagon parked to the left and a low commercial garage ahead. Finally, the camera tracks forward as the street stretches into a dense fog punctuated by scattered trees and utility poles.
